topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Data Visualization. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Data Scientist roles.
whyItMatters: Data Visualization is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Data Visualization in a real-world scenario
Handling edge cases in Data Visualization
practiceQuestions: Write a program demonstrating Data Visualization.
Fix the bug in the given Data Visualization snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Data Visualization?
How does Data Visualization handle memory management?
advancedProjects: Integrate Data Visualization into a microservice
Scale Data Visualization for 10k concurrent users
companyQuestions: How Amazon asks about Data Visualization
